title: REMEMORY RECOVERY BUNDLE
other_holders: OTHER FRIENDS WHO HOLD PIECES (contact to coordinate recovery)
recover_step1: Double-click the file named recover.html (it's in the same folder as this PDF).
recover_share_loaded: YOUR PIECE IS ALREADY LOADED. The recovery tool already has your piece.
recover_no_html: If you don't have recover.html, visit https://eljojo.github.io/rememory/recover
recover_step2_embedded: 2. The encrypted data is already loaded — no action needed.
recover_step2_embedded_hint: If you're using a different recovery tool, drag this recover.html file onto it.
recover_step3_contact: Contact the other friends shown on the webpage. They can provide their piece by:
recover_step5_auto: Once you have {0} pieces, the files unlock on their own.
recover_step6: Save the recovered files to your computer.
recover_anon_step3: Gather the missing pieces from other people. For each, you can:
recover_anon_step4_auto: Once you have {0} pieces, the files unlock on their own.
recover_anon_step5: Save the recovered files to your computer.
recover_offline: Works completely offline — no internet required.
recover_offline_tlock: Recovery requires a brief internet connection.
recover_cli_hint: The steps above work for most people. If you're stuck, ask someone familiar with computers for help.
recover_cli_for_helper: For the person helping: download the rememory command-line tool from the link below. Then run it pointing at the README.txt (or README.pdf) files from each friend's bundle. No installation needed — just download and run.
recover_cli_run: Then run it with the README files from each friend's bundle:
recover_cli_no_install: No installation needed — just download and run.
recovery_words_hint:
Read these words to the person helping you, or type them
into the recovery tool at recover.html.
recovery_words_dual_hint: Either list works for recovery. They encode the same data.
machine_readable: TEXT FORMAT (for pasting into the recovery tool):
machine_readable_hint: Copy the entire block below, including the -----BEGIN and -----END lines.
recovery_rule: TO OPEN THE FILES, YOU NEED:
recover_step1_browsers: It will open in your browser. (Your own piece is already loaded automatically).
path1_body: You don't need to do anything right now. This is a backup plan for {0}'s files. Just keep this document somewhere safe.
path2_body: Send them your whole ZIP file, or this PDF. If that's not possible, call them and read your 12 recovery words (found on PAGE 3).
path3_body: If you are the one organizing the recovery, go to PAGE 2 for step-by-step instructions.
recover_step2_manifest: Click the big button on the webpage to select the encrypted file (MANIFEST.age) from your folder.
recover_step3_how1: Sending you their ZIP or PDF. Click 'Add their file' to upload it.
recover_step3_how2: Calling you and reading their 12 recovery words. Click 'Type in words' to enter them.
recover_step3_how3: Sending their piece text in a message. Click 'Paste text' to add it.
recover_step4_checkmarks: A checkmark appears next to each friend's name as you add their piece.
recover_anon_step3_how1: Upload their PDF or ZIP file.
